message:
chore(deps): switch asupersync to local path dependency and refine error formatting

- Switch asupersync dependency from version "0.2.9" to local path
  "../asupersync" to track local development changes in lock step
- Refine PolledAfterCompletion error arm formatting: extract format!
  result into a `detail` variable before constructing the error struct
  for clearer control flow (fastembed_embedder.rs in both root and
  frankensearch-embed crates)
- Adjust assert! line wrapping in lexical and rerank test cases to
  satisfy rustfmt column limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
